channel.title: INall
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INall, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New airline math: How your points and miles are shaping where your favorite carrier flies
item.description: Airlines are picking destinations that will inspire loyalty program members to earn (and redeem) their points and miles — and maybe pick up a credit c...

item.title: Moderna’s work developing seasonal vaccines is ‘risky’ under current FDA, analyst says
item.description: The biotech company said the FDA won’t review its flu vaccine, in the latest hit to mRNA development.

item.title: Amazon Pharmacy to expand same-day delivery to nearly 4,500 US cities
item.description: The expansion will cover customers in newly served states such as Idaho and Massachusetts.

item.title: Olympian's Ex-Girlfriend Responds To On-Air Cheating Confession
item.description: It appears Sturla Holm Laegreid's not out of the doghouse (yet?) -- his ex-girlfriend has addressed his public cheating confession during the Winter O...

item.title: This Is Why Coffee Is Linked To Improved Longevity & Heart Health
item.description: Coffee has hundreds of bioactive ingredients. These are 7 of the key antioxidants.

item.title: New Nancy Guthrie Note, Sender Demands 1 Bitcoin for Info On Kidnapping Suspect
item.description: There's a new note in the Nancy Guthrie case, but this one doesn't seem to be from the kidnapper ... instead, it's from someone offering to give up in...

item.title: T-Mobile’s stock turns higher after earnings. Here’s what’s impressing Wall Street.
item.description: The company gave an upbeat forecast for service revenue at its investor day on Wednesday, overshadowing some weak points in its fourth-quarter results...

item.title: ‘She is planning to move out of state’: My sister sold our elderly mother’s house from under her. What can I do?
item.description: “She claims that she needs to have those funds available for when our mother eventually requires nursing-home care.”

item.title: 20 stocks of companies that delivered a double dose of growth this earnings season
item.description: Companies in the S&P 500 achieving double-digit sales growth while improving profit margins include Palantir, Micron, Boeing and Alphabet.

item.title: This Metric Is The #1 Predictor Of Future Strength — Here’s How To Test Yours
item.description: This “vital sign” doesn’t require a doctor’s office

item.title: Which AAdvantage card is right for you? Here are 3 options you should consider
item.description: Citi has a few AAdvantage cobranded cards that are worth considering. Which one is right for you depends on how often you fly with the airline.

item.title: Zayn Malik Doubles Down, Says He Was Never in Love With Gigi Hadid
item.description: Zayn Malik is doubling down on a past claim that he's never been in love ... not even with his daughter's mom, Gigi Hadid. The singer got super candid...

item.title: Former Founders Fund VC Sam Blond launches AI sales startup to upend Salesforce
item.description: The startup, Monaco, has come out of stealth as an AI-native all-in-one CRM plus more system backed by names like the Collison brothers and Garry Tan.

item.title: I Asked a Fitness Expert About Vibration Plates — Here's What She Really Thinks
item.description: The truth about vibration plates from someone who's actually read the research

item.title: First look: Amtrak enters a 'whole new era' with Airo trains for the Cascades, Northeast Regional
item.description: Amtrak is ready to debut its first new Airo trains on the Cascades line in the Pacific Northwest this summer.

item.title: Ilhan Omar Seems to Reference Trump as 'Pedophile Protection Party' Leader
item.description: President Donald Trump and his party might hate Somalia ... but, at least Somalia executes pedophiles there instead of electing them -- so says Rep. I...

item.title: Build a pipeline and close deals with an exhibit table at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Get an unmatched ROI by exhibiting your startup in front of 10,000 tech leaders and investors at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026, October 13-15 in San Francis...

item.title: This Is The Most Consistent Predictor Of Longevity — Are You Doing It?
item.description: Plus, check out these mobility-focused exercises to do at every age

item.title: Upside Robotics is reducing fertilizer use and waste in corn crops
item.description: Upside Robotics builds autonomous solar-powered robots that can help farmers reduce their fertilizer use by 70%.

item.title: Jeannie Mai Spotted Getting Cozy With Anderson .Paak During Dinner, on Video
item.description: Looks like a new celeb spark might be brewing ... because Jeannie Mai was just spotted getting real cozy with none other than Anderson .Paak. Catch th...

item.title: Coal stocks gain as Trump looks set to issue executive order calling for industry deals with military
item.description: Coal stocks advanced Wednesday following news that President Donald Trump plans to sign an executive order that could help the industry.

item.title: TikTok launches an opt-in Local Feed in the U.S. leveraging users’ precise location
item.description: TikTok's new Local Feed will show you nearby shopping, dining, events, news, and more.

item.title: Your Air Fryer Might Be Working Against You—Here's the Easy Fix
item.description: It could be doing more harm than good if you're not staying on top of frequent cleanings.

item.title: United, JetBlue expand Blue Sky partnership, with elite perks coming by spring
item.description: United Airlines and JetBlue just expanded earning and redemption options for their loyalty members as part of a new partnership that launched last yea...

item.title: The best Caribbean cruise for every type of traveler
item.description: Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, Carnival, Disney Cruise Line and Windstar are among the lines with top cruise options in the Caribbean.
